displayName.description: The display name of the identityUserFlowAttribute within a user flow.

isOptional.description: Determines whether the identityUserFlowAttribute is optional. true means the user doesn't have to provide a value. false means the user can't complete sign-up without providing a value.

requiresVerification.description: Determines whether the identityUserFlowAttribute requires verification, and is only used for verifying the user's phone number or email address.

userAttributeValues.description: The input options for the user flow attribute. Only applicable when the userInputType is radioSingleSelect, dropdownSingleSelect, or checkboxMultiSelect.

userAttribute.description: The user attribute that you want to add to your user flow.
